appupdaterequiredcopy-original:
This app version is not supported anymore. To guarantee it’s working reliably, you need to update.
If you have an App Store / Play Store account, you can tap ‘Update Now’ to get the latest version immediately.
If not, contact us: +1 (848) 244-8928
assets.abtmfocuswebinarteaser.cta-origin: Want to directly link repairs and checks with your asset? Join our upcoming Focus Webinar and learn from other municipalities!
assets.abtmteaser.copylong-original:
You don’t have a proper digital overview over all the regular checks and Work Orders that got done or need to get done on one Asset?
We’ve got you covered: You can now link Work Orders and Assets. Keep the overview in only one tool, save time and easily document your work in a legally-compliant way!
assets.abtmteaser.copyshort-original:
Lacking a digital overview of your regular check-ins and Work Orders completed on a given Asset?
You can now link Work Orders and Assets. See the big-picture, save time and easily document your work!

Start inventorying now and benefit:
👁️ Digital asset inventory: Know what is where

assets.intro.description-original: Where are our park benches? How many trash cans are there in this neighborhood? How long has this tree been here? How old is this playground equipment?
assets.intro.soon-original: Soon, you’ll be able to do even more with your assets: In a few weeks, it will be possible to attach Work Orders to Assets. This will allow you to create legally compliant documentation of all your inspections, such as playground inspections or tree inspections.

datasynchronization.nonetwork-original:
You are currently offline.

This means:
- No live notifications or real-time updates.
- You cannot change the title, priority, assignee or due date of a Work Order.
- Linked Asset, cost data, documents and changelog of a Work Order will not be displayed.
- Existing Assets, Track Controls and Winter Services will not be displayed.

However, you can still:
- Create new Work Orders, Assets, Track Controls, and Winter Services without restrictions.
- These will sync automatically once you're back online.

We recommend:
- Enabling offline availability for Work Orders and map in the app settings
- Using the ToDo app with a SIM card for the best experience

frenchtreatments.description.bouchagenid: En régie propre. Utiliser généralement en collectivité pour faire du curatif et boucher les nids de poule de manière manuelle avant d’imperméabiliser la route en ECF ou enduits
frenchtreatments.description.enrobecoule: Externalisé. Utiliser généralement pour refaire de manière premium les routes et assurer une longue durée de vie pour faire des tapis de surface ou complet sur tout type de route notamment les réseaux structurants et de redresser les déformations
En régie propre. Utiliser généralement en collectivité pour faire du curatif et boucher les nids de poule de manière manuelle
frenchtreatments.description.enrobeproje: Externalisé. Utiliser généralement pour faire du curatif et boucher les nids de poule avec une machine à chaud
frenchtreatments.description.pata-origin: Externalisé. Le point à temps automatique est une technique avec machine qui a pour objet la réparation des couches de roulement des chaussées en des points ciblés (sur mesure) où celles-ci ont subi des dégradations de surface
frenchtreatments.description.pontagefiss: Externalisé. Utiliser généralement pour faire du curatif et ponter les fissures er les joints la durée de vie dépendra de plusieurs facteurs comme le climat et le traffic
frenchtreatments.description.renouvellem: Externalisé. Enduit superficiel résistant comprenant de l’enrobé coulé à chaud et de l’enrobé coulé à froid. Important de prendre en compte la déformation avant de choisir cette technique.

Externalisé. L’enduit superficiel d'usure (parfois abrégé en ESU) est une couche de roulement réalisée en place et constituée de 2 couches de liant hydrocarboné et de granulats répandues successivement pour des dégradations de surfaces. Important de prendre en compte la déformation avant de choisir cette technique
Externalisé. Enduit superficiel comprenant de l’enrobé projeté et de l’enrobé coulé à froid. Important de prendre en compte la déformation avant de choisir cette technique.

newappversionavailable.copy-original: We’ll automatically update your device within the next few days. If you have an App Store or Play Store account, you can tap ‘Update Now’ to get the latest version immediately.
newfeaturemodal.condition.content-origin:
Creating a reliable data foundation is essential for informed decision-making and efficient road management. With the new vialytics Road Database, you have a centralized software solution designed for professional, efficient road oversight.

Effortlessly organize your roads within a fully customizable table, giving you the flexibility to add unique attributes, change road classifications, name unknown roads, set surface types, or exclude sections from evaluation.
newfeaturemodal.plannedsegments.content-:
Customize your planning list according to your requirements. Add your own user-defined properties to the planning list. Organize the columns as you wish and edit your planning list directly in the table. New filters are also available for a better overview. 
Watch the video and familiarize yourself with the new functions!
newfeaturemodal.plannedsegments.header-o: New functions available for the planning list! 🚀
newfeaturemodal.trafficsigns.content-ori: Now you can interact with your traffic signs. Verify or delete AI-detected traffic signs on your own. Moreover, you can create traffic signs out of the system, edit existing traffic signs, and attach documents to each traffic sign.
newfeaturemodal.trafficsigns.header-orig: New: Create and interact with traffic signs 🚀

plannedsegments.autoupdate.text-original:
Changes affect only planned segments which are 
(*) in planning. To ensure your data is up-to-date, you can:
plannedsegments.autoupdate.text1-origina: Update all (*) in planning segments at once
plannedsegments.autoupdate.text2-origina: Update each (*) in planning segment individually later
plannedsegments.budget.budgetnotset-orig: Budgets not set for one or more timeframes.
plannedsegments.budget.delete.text-origi: Deleting this budget will delete it permanently.
plannedsegments.budget.featurereleasemod:
Planning List becomes Budget Planner
Use it to plan your annual budget and always keep the total amount in view.

Calculate the Remaining Service Life
A complete planning list and the specification of Remaining Service Life for individual measures are essential for a condition forecast. If both apply, the sum of miles*years will indicate whether enough is being done to maintain the value of your road network.

Calculate the Remaining Service Life
A complete planning list and the specification of Remaining Service Life for individual measures are essential for a condition forecast. If both apply, the sum of kilometers*years will indicate whether enough is being done to maintain the value of your road network.

plannedsegments.budget.networksizeinfo-o: To calculate Remaining Service Life of your network we pre-populate the size with our estimation based on your inspections. Edit the input as needed.
plannedsegments.budget.notsetfortimefram: Budgets not set for timeframe(s). Define budgets to track expenses.
plannedsegments.budget.settingsinfo-orig: Budgets can be set for specific timeframes to better manage your spending. They will appear as filter sets and as tabs in the table view. When a segment is planned for a year, that year will be added to the budgets.
plannedsegments.budget.tooltip.defaultst: Define a default street width for quicker planning. The street width can be adjusted for each segment as needed. Leave blank if no default value is wanted.

prompt.delete.category.text-original: Deleting this Work Order Type will permanently remove it. All Work Orders within this Work Order Type will no longer have an assigned Work Order Type. This action cannot be undone.

rdb.exlcude.modal.text-original:
You are about to disable grading for the selected road classification. This change will affect all segments using this classification, and grading data will no longer be available for them.

The affected segments will:

• Continue to count toward the total length.
• Appear in gray on the map for clarity.
• Retain point images for reference.

Please confirm to apply this change to all affected segments. These changes can be undone.

settings.rolespermissions.defaultroles.a: Intended for just very few persons that can manage users, roles and layer settings for the whole team account.
settings.rolespermissions.defaultroles.c: Intended for contractors who should only have access to the Work Orders assigned to them, enabling them to efficiently complete their work. Example: A contractor repairing damaged manholes.
settings.rolespermissions.defaultroles.f: Intended for persons focused on completing Work Orders. Example: Public works staff.
settings.rolespermissions.defaultroles.r: Resetting this role will restore its permissions to default. This action cannot be undone.
settings.rolespermissions.defaultroles.s: Intended for persons that need the full overview and prepare, prioritize and assign Work Orders to others. E.g. public works director.
settings.rolespermissions.defaultroles.v: Intended for persons that would like to have insight to some data without being able to change or delete anything. Example: Politicans.

teaser.immodule.description-original:
Your advantages:
• Auto-detect damaged traffic signs 🪧
• Auto-detect damaged manholes/storm drains 🕳️
• Get Road Safety Alerts for damaged objects ⚠️ 
• Get an automated AI-supported traffic sign overview 🛑

‘We save about 60 % of our time through reduced outdoor drives and less manual effort.’  (Sebastian Beel, building authority, Krailling, Germany)

Upgrade now!
teaser.immodule.headline-original: Upgrade now: Our new Inventory Management module!
teaser.winterservicetaskmanagement.descr:
❄️ Winter Service:
• Document winter services automatically in a separate layer
• Document used operation mode (Salting/Plowing)
• Filter by date to protect yourself in insurance cases

☑️ Work Order Management:
• Assign Work Orders to people
• Set due dates
• Create recurring Work Orders
teaser.winterservicetaskmanagement.title: New free application update: Winter Service + Task Management features

trafficsigns.textsearch.errorvalidation-: Please enter a value between 0 and 359
trafficsigns.textsearch.info-original: Search for text on directional signs with the character recognition feature.
trafficsigns.weautomaticallydetecttraffi: We automatically detect traffic signs from your created condition assessments. Inspect some streets to get results shown here.
transcriptionpermissionmodalios-original: Allows to automatically translate voice recordings to text.
treatments.info-original: Presets contain estimates and can be customized for accurate cost projections. Add new treatments to reflect custom use cases. Uncheck default treatments if not important.
usatreatments.description.basestabilizat: Improves load-bearing properties of aggregate base layer, conserving resources and reducing costs in low-quality aggregate areas.
usatreatments.description.capeseal-origi: Combines chip seal with slurry/micro surfacing, sealing cracks, providing skid resistance, moisture protection, and a uniform appearance.
usatreatments.description.chipseal-origi: Layered asphalt binder with aggregate, offers skid resistance, stops raveling, seals minor cracks, and prevents further deterioration.
usatreatments.description.coldcentralpla: Utilizes high-quality RAP for asphalt production, reducing landfill waste and project costs.
usatreatments.description.coldinplacerec: Process recycling top layers of asphalt, significantly reducing costs and resources for road repair.
usatreatments.description.coldplaningmic: Controlled removal of pavement surface to desired depth or slope for excavation, reconstruction, or maintenance.
usatreatments.description.crackseal-orig: Cost-effective method to treat cracks greater than 1/8", preventing pavement failure like potholes.
usatreatments.description.fogseal-origin: Light emulsified asphalt application on existing asphalt surfaces.
usatreatments.description.fulldepthrecla: Sustainable alternative to deep rehabilitation or replacement methods for asphalt pavements. It involves pulverizing the pavement and underlying materials to create a uniform, upgraded material, which can be further strengthened.
usatreatments.description.fulldepthremov: Rehabilitates asphalt pavement and underlying materials, enhancing structural capacity via mechanical, chemical, or bituminous stabilization.
usatreatments.description.hotinplacerecy: On-site technique for pavement preservation and corrective maintenance, improving recycled pavement characteristics.
usatreatments.description.microsurfacing: Economical, quick, treatment for good pavement, offering skid resistance, moisture control, oxidation protection, leveling.
usatreatments.description.scrubseal-orig: Similar to chip seal but uses brooms to guide asphalt into cracks for thorough sealing.
usatreatments.description.slurryseal-ori: Enhances skid resistance, restricts moisture, prevents oxidation, restores black appearance on good asphalt pavements.
usatreatments.description.soilstabilizat: Enhancing soil via additives like lime, fly ash, or cement reduces plasticity, bolsters strength, and improves workability for better load-bearing capacity in pavements and foundations.
usatreatments.description.ultrathinlifth: Asphalt treatment for smooth surfaces, addressing raveling, low-severity cracking, and oxidation.
useraccount.resetpwtooltip-original: Password changes are managed by your SSO provider, not our system. Contact your account administrator at your municipality.
users.invitationlinkcopied-original: Invitation link copied. Please forward it to the according person via email to complete registration, or complete it for the user.
users.usernamealreadyexistschooseanother: Username already exists, choose another one
whatneedstobedone-original: What needs to be done here?
winterservice.intro-original: Automatically document your winter services with gps-track, timestamp and the used operation mode (Plowing/Salting). While doing that you can easily create Work Orders for disturbing objects.
winterservice.newwinterservicesessioncre: Winter service(s) saved. It will get shown as soon as network is available. Click on ‘No network’ to show upload queue.
winterservice.nogpstrackrecordedcopy-ori: This inspection didn’t contain any gps-track and is therefore not saved. To create a proper recording, move your position.
winterservice.sessionconfirmation.nogpst: You’ve created recordings without gps-tracks. They are neither saved nor shown here.
workorders.workordermanagementplusteaser: Everything you need for professional Work Order management:
Reorder Work Order types, Categories, Templates, Time Tracking, Cost Centers, and more. Document seamlessly, save time, and stay organized — all in one simple yet flexible tool.

To align with our new module and better reflect commonly used terminology, we’re renaming a few key terms:
Tasks → Work Orders
Categories → Work Order Types

To better reflect commonly used terminology, we’ve renamed a few key terms in our app:
Tasks → Work Orders
Categories → Work Order Types
Work Orders are the new Tasks:
New module available: 📋 Work Order Management Plus
youcanalsoshakeyourphonetosyncyourdata-o: You can also just shake your phone to sync your data!

youvenotenteredanemailaddress-original: You’ve not entered an e-mail address. Please get in touch with us. We’ll help you to get logged in.
